summary: W1480 refines the W1479 W987 construction surface by replacing the target-difference surjectivity primitive family with an explicit preimage chooser family and preimage equation family. It reconstructs the target-difference surjectivity primitive from those witness fields, preserves the W1479 normalized lift object-image and localized right-adjoint functor splits, and feeds the resulting data through the W1477 route while reassembling W519, W973, W945, W730, W986, and W987. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1480 reconstructs the W987 route from sixty-three conceptual inputs, including raw boundary fields, raw relation fields, a target-difference surjectivity preimage chooser family and preimage equation family, target-codomain compact no-univ membership primitive family, three W714 selected-difference closed-embedding diagram component fields, a raw mapped explicit cokernel closed-embedding field, eight normalized-lift object strict-preimage fields, six normalized-lift map strict-preimage fields, normalized-lift zero and one source-map identity laws, normalized-lift zero and one source-map composition laws, normalized-lift zero and one object-image normalization laws, normalized-lift left and right arrow-image normalization laws, normalized-lift zero and one component map-image normalization laws, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation fields, endpoint kernel/cokernel-top fields, localized right-adjoint object and morphism maps plus identity and composition laws, localized adjunction unit/counit component and naturality fields, localized adjunction left/right triangle component identity fields, unit-mapping-cone kernel/cokernel-top fields, and unit-mapping-cone iso hom/inv/identity fields rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.
